_comment: OMEGA AI MCP Credentials Configuration - ENHANCED
_instructions: Copy this file to credentials.json and fill in your actual credentials
_security_note: Never commit credentials.json to version control!

_setup_instructions.step_2: Fill in your actual service credentials
_setup_instructions.twilio: 1. Sign up at twilio.com 2. Get Account SID and Auth Token 3. Enable WhatsApp sandbox
_setup_instructions.telegram: 1. Create bot with @BotFather 2. Get bot token 3. Get your chat_id by messaging the bot
_setup_instructions.discord: 1. Create Discord webhook in your server 2. Copy webhook URL
_setup_instructions.slack: 1. Create Slack app 2. Add webhook 3. Copy webhook URL
_setup_instructions.smtp: 1. Enable 2FA on Gmail 2. Generate App Password 3. Use app password here

_environment_alternative.note: You can also use environment variables instead of this file
_environment_alternative.example: Set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, etc. in your environment
_environment_alternative.precedence: Environment variables take precedence over this file
